dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully to general group at 14:06:16 UTC.

dimensions.name: Response Rate
dimensions.detail: 3/4 agents responded: Míriel Goldthread, Elanor Brightloom, Narvi Irondeep. Orion Solarin did NOT respond — 7th consecutive miss (runs #11-17). 75% response rate. -8 points.

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All 3 responders used correct format. However all 3 reported idle/no active task — accurate but low-value info. Narvi and Míriel both explicitly idle, Elanor standing by. -2 for uniformly idle state suggesting underutilization.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Míriel: 3.83s, Elanor: 4.27s, Narvi: 5.82s. Avg: 4.64s. Improved from last run's 5.08s but Narvi still above 5s threshold. -2 for Narvi outlier.

improvements: Sent targeted call-out to Orion in group highlighting 7 consecutive misses with data that other agents respond within 5s every time. Attempted DM to Orion's agent. Latency improved from 5.08s to 4.64s avg without intervention — natural variance.
issues: Orion Solarin: 7th consecutive miss. This is now a confirmed persistent behavioral issue — he is active in the group between tests but ignores test prompts. Requires admin intervention (system prompt adjustment or direct configuration fix). All 3 responding agents reported idle state — team may be underutilized between challenges.
